descriptors: Now I struggle like a ferocious animal not to succumb to this cruel world
system.agenda: Find a safe place to stay or a group of people ready to accept and protect me
system.background: A ten-year-old girl, the sole survivor of a massacre at a ruined castle on a hill. The men and women who once lived within its walls apparently killed each other in the madness brought by the curse. Traumatized and angry, she hides with a knife and will attack anyone who approaches, driven by fear and survival instinct.
